raw_consumer_statement:
I had serval thousands of dollars of fraud on my Citibank credit card in XXXX after your company erroneously sent a replacement card to the wrong address. I paid approximately {$760.00} and disputed the charges which were ultimately determined by Citibank to be fraud. That money was never returned to me. I need all money owed to me refunded and sent to my new address below. I contacted your company attempting to resolve this issues several times and was finally told to write a letter with the information below to this address. Please let me know if there is anything else I need to do. 

I contacted CitiBank via a phone call on XX/XX/XXXX after being notified by a third party that the money was owed to me. They told me to mail the information to them which I did the same day. I mailed them the information above with additional credit card information. I have still not been contacted by the company. Since then I have spent hours on the phone trying to resolve the issue with CitiBank without success.
